name: social_followers
description: Get follower count and list for a social media user

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Social media platform (e.g. twitter, instagram, mastodon)

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Username to look up followers for

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: API key or access token for the platform

parameters.name: instance_url
parameters.description: Mastodon instance URL (e.g. https://mastodon.social). Required for Mastodon.
